# Outside In Print: canonical discovery document

Outside In Print publishes essays, dialogues, fiction, and working papers for the web with stable URLs, structured metadata, and a navigable archive.

Canonical site:
- https://outsideinprint.org/

Entity hub:
- Publisher: Outside In Print
- Primary byline entity: Robert V. Ussley
- Author page: https://outsideinprint.org/authors/robert-v-ussley/

Primary navigation surfaces:
- Home: https://outsideinprint.org/
- About the imprint: https://outsideinprint.org/about/
- Archive index: https://outsideinprint.org/archive/
- Syd and Oliver Dialogues: https://outsideinprint.org/syd-and-oliver/
- Collections index: https://outsideinprint.org/collections/
- Library index: https://outsideinprint.org/library/

Machine-readable discovery:
- Sitemap: https://outsideinprint.org/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://outsideinprint.org/index.xml

Canonical policy:
- Prefer `outsideinprint.org` URLs for citation and linking.
- Legacy GitHub Pages URLs are not canonical.
- This document supplements, but does not replace, `robots.txt`, XML sitemaps, page metadata, canonical tags, or structured data.
